acceptance_criteria.text: ForgeLink supports local RSS/trusted signal subscriptions with feed identity, fetch interval, enabled state, last fetch status, and bounded retention.
Signals are persisted separately from SMS conversations and agent messages, with migration, backup/export, retention, and recovery behavior.
The UI presents signals as a bounded, intentional reading surface with pause/mute/archive controls and no infinite feed, ranking algorithm, likes, follows, or engagement mechanics.
Feed fetching is secure and bounded: timeouts, size limits, content-type handling, external URL opening rules, and no automatic execution of feed content.
The old PySide/Qt RSS app is located if available and reviewed for importable subscriptions or useful behavior; if unavailable, the search and decision are documented.
Tests cover feed parsing, duplicate item handling, failed fetch states, retention, export/backup, UI separation, and notification boundaries.
